description: Use this API to return an array of integer values for subsystem areas. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.3.0. ierr, iarray = aareaint(sid, flag, string)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: Defines the area subsystem to be used. (input; -1 by default).

parameters.name: flag
parameters.description: A flag indicating which subsystem areas to include. (input; 1 by default).

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: An array of NSTR elements specifying NSTR of the following strings indicating the area quantities desired. (input; no default allowed).

return_values.name: iarray
return_values.description: An array of NSTR*DIM elements specifying Is an array of at least NSTR columns, each of which contains DIM elements. (output).

sid.description: to instruct the API to assume a subsystem containing all areas in the working case.
valid area subsystem identifier. Valid subsystem identifiers range from 0 to 11. Subsystem SID must have been previously defined.

flag.description: for only subsystem areas with at least one ac bus assigned to them.
for subsystem areas with any equipment (ac buses, loads, and/or dc buses) assigned to them.

string.description: Number of the area swing bus used for area interchange control purposes.
Area swing bus substation number (0 if bus is not in a substation).
Area swing bus section number (0 if bus is not represented by multiple bus sections).
Number of ac buses assigned to the area.
Number of loads assigned to the area.
Number of induction machines assigned to the area.
Number of dc buses assigned to the area.

error_codes.description: DIM, and hence the size of IARRAY, is not large enough.
